case_title: ANGELA ACEVEDO VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
